Title: Tsui ni chokusetsu taiketsu!! Ginyû taichô no odemashi da
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Laura Bailey
Plot: Start of the "Captain Ginyu Saga". Goku continues to fight Jeice and Burter, and Jeice retreats to warn Captain Ginyu. Goku and Vegeta argue over the fate of the defeated Ginyu Force members, the dragon balls, and fighting Frieza ...
